Description: Panel buttons to GND; Teensy internal pullups
Mates FE J3. Pin 6 (LDAC_N) tied low. 17-20: ADC lives on the FE board
Floating 5V from linear PSU J3 (replaces on-board DC-DC)
Ethernet via PJRC Ethernet Kit on bottom pads; USB for programming
Chop/range LEVELS + K3/K4 coil logic across barrier
K5 coils forward; ADC SDOA + BUSY reverse
8ch DMOS sink (ULN2803 pinout). Ch1/2 = LEVEL sinks for SSR chop/range (FE pull-ups); ch3-8 = coil pulses
